display.purpose: Stage headings, drawer titles, and cockpit titles.

title.purpose: Selected claims, card titles, and important structured choices.

body.purpose: Evidence summaries, explanations, and helper text.

label.purpose: Chips, metadata, and compact UI labels.

mono.purpose: Metrics, IDs, JSON preview, and small instrument labels.

shadows.name: drawer
shadows.purpose: Review drawer separation over the arena.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, border, background, and small transform transitions.

components.name: Primary Button On Dark
components.description: Primary action for dark investigation surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-dark { background: var(--tc-surface, #f7f3ea); border: 1px solid rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.56); border-radius: 16px; color: #141a25; cursor: pointer; font: 850 14px/1 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); min-height: 46px; padding: 0 16px; transition: background 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, opacity 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary-dark:hover { background: #fffaf0; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary-dark:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--tc-focus, #5f6f52); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary-dark:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.45; transform: none; }

components.name: Primary Button On Light
components.description: Primary action for the light semantic atlas.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-light { background: #2e302d; border: 1px solid #2e302d; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(70, 61, 47, 0.13), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); color: #fbfaf7; cursor: pointer; font: 850 14px/1 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); min-height: 44px; padding: 0 18px; transition: background 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary-light:hover { background: #1f211f; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary-light:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--tc-focus, #5f6f52); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact semantic status label with text and color.
components.css: .ds-status-chip { align-items: center; background: rgba(130, 178, 139, 0.16); border: 1px solid rgba(130, 178, 139, 0.36); border-radius: 999px; color: #bfe4c6; display: inline-flex; font: 800 12px/1 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); min-height: 30px; padding: 0 11px; }

components.name: Dark Evidence Card
components.description: Dark arena card for evidence, claims, or structured choices.
components.html:
EvidenceRole lifecycle feature stack

Synthetic salient features include CreateRole, AttachRolePolicy, and TagRole.
components.css: .ds-card-dark { background: rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.12); border-radius: 18px; color: #f7f3ea; display: grid; gap: 9px; padding: 15px; } .ds-card-dark span { color: rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.66); font: 800 11px/1.25 var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); } .ds-card-dark strong { color: #f7f3ea; font: 820 15px/1.35 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); } .ds-card-dark p { color: rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.66); font: 400 14px/1.55 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); margin: 0; }

components.name: Light Region Dossier
components.description: Light selected-region dossier in the semantic atlas.
components.html:
Selected region

IAM role provisioning

The AI claim is under test; evidence support and uncertainty drive the next action.
components.css: .ds-region-dossier { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9), rgba(251, 250, 246, 0.78)), #fbfaf6; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.76); border-radius: 28px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78); color: #2e302d; display: grid; gap: 10px; padding: 22px; } .ds-region-dossier span { color: rgba(46, 48, 45, 0.56); font: 800 12px/1.2 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); } .ds-region-dossier h3 { color: #2e302d; font: 740 25px/1.08 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; } .ds-region-dossier p { color: rgba(47, 48, 45, 0.74); font: 400 15px/1.45 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); margin: 0; }

components.name: Stage Rail Button
components.css: .ds-stage-rail-button { align-items: center; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 16px; color: rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.66); cursor: pointer; display: grid; gap: 5px; justify-items: center; min-height: 68px; padding: 8px 4px; text-align: center; transition: background 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-stage-rail-button:hover { background: rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.1); border-color: rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.18); color: #f7f3ea; } .ds-stage-rail-button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--tc-focus, #5f6f52); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-stage-index { align-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(247, 243, 234, 0.16); border-radius: 999px; display: flex; font: 12px/1 var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); height: 30px; justify-content: center; width: 30px; } .ds-stage-label { font: 800 11px/1.1 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); }

narrative.overview:
Telemetry Court combines a calm high-trust product shell with a spatial investigation arena. The system should feel like a scientific review instrument: restrained, precise, and quiet enough for careful judgment, while still making the telemetry landscape feel alive and interactive.

The design has two coordinated surface modes. The global product context uses warm neutral canvas, soft surfaces, muted borders, and system sans typography. The Evidence Arena uses a darker spatial cockpit for staged review work, while the Explore / Galaxy mode can return to a lighter semantic atlas when readability and evidence inspection need priority.

It rejects threat-wall drama, fake terminal styling, neon cyber aesthetics, generic AI decoration, and dense dashboard grids. Semantic color exists to clarify evidence status, uncertainty, contradiction, impurity, and overclaim risk.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained neutral product UI with semantic color used sparingly.
Spatial evidence maps that behave as primary interaction, not wallpaper.
Structured-choice controls with clear selected, hover, disabled, and focus states.
Claim, evidence, score, and verdict hierarchy before ornament.
Plainspoken copy that names uncertainty and missing evidence directly.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Status colors are reserved for evidence support, contradiction, uncertainty, impurity, and verdict meaning. They are not decorative accents.

rules.name: The Two Surface Rule
rules.body: Light atlas surfaces and dark investigation surfaces may coexist, but each screen must make one mode dominant so the product does not feel patched together.

rules.name: The No Drama Type Rule
rules.body: Product labels, buttons, metrics, and evidence summaries stay in Geist or Geist Mono. Do not introduce display fonts for functional UI.

rules.name: The Surface First Rule
rules.body: Use background tone, border, and spacing before shadow. Shadows are for shell depth, drawers, and active interaction feedback, not default card decoration.

dos: Do keep evidence hierarchy explicit: case context, AI claim reveal state, claims, evidence, support score, verdict, and risks.
Do use structured choices for blind interpretation, evidence classification, label duel, impostor selection, failure modes, and verdict.
Do use semantic status text with every color-coded status.
Do preserve the warm neutral product shell (`#f4f2ee`, `#fbfaf7`) and the dark arena shell (`#111723`, `#f7f3ea`) as deliberate surface modes.
Do keep motion subtle, state-driven, and compatible with `prefers-reduced-motion`.
donts: Don't make Telemetry Court look like a SIEM, SOC dashboard, threat-intelligence dashboard, chatbot, cyberpunk wall, fake terminal, or neon security tool.
Don't use Matrix green, decorative cyber gradients, generic AI sparkle visuals, alarmist red, dense dashboard grids, or required free-text fields in the main workflow.
Don't invent evidence, telemetry fields, Toponymy APIs, real incident claims, customer data, or restricted telemetry.
Don't copy Wealthsimple, Apple, Linear, or any other brand's protected assets, slogans, exact layouts, icons, imagery, screenshots, or proprietary visual identity.
Don't use color alone to communicate support, contradiction, uncertainty, impurity, or verdict state.
Don't add decorative side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism by default, or repeated identical card grids.
